summary: Iteration 2: Completed comprehensive testing of new KMS envelope encryption and Drops feature. All 49 tests passed (24 regression + 25 new). Envelope encryption round-trip works, legacy v0 blobs still decrypt, drops CRUD endpoints function correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: KMS envelope encryption properly implemented with per-encryption DEK for forward secrecy
Legacy v0 backward compatibility correctly handles pre-KMS encrypted blobs
KEK ID recorded in envelope enables future key rotation without breaking existing data
Drops endpoints properly validate input (lat/lng bounds, required fields)
MongoDB TTL index on drops.expires_at will auto-cleanup expired drops
drops.created_at -1 index supports efficient recent-first queries
seed_data_creation: Test drops created during testing (will auto-expire via TTL). Test users with prefix 'TEST_' cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 49 backend tests passing. New test file test_kms_and_drops.py covers envelope encryption and drops features. Spotify OAuth callback still mocked - cannot test full OAuth round-trip without browser.

kms_envelope_encryption.envelope_format: PASS - base64-of-JSON with {v:1, k:'local/v1', d, n, c}
kms_envelope_encryption.per_encryption_dek: PASS - same plaintext produces different ciphertexts AND different wrapped DEKs
kms_envelope_encryption.legacy_v0_compat: PASS - legacy raw AES-GCM blobs still decrypt correctly
kms_envelope_encryption.rotation_ready: PASS - KmsProvider.key_id() returns 'local/v1', envelope records KEK id

drops_feature.create_drop: PASS - returns drop with id, user, track, mood, caption, color, waves=0, tunes_in=0, created_at, expires_at
drops_feature.list_drops: PASS - returns {drops: [...]} sorted by created_at desc
drops_feature.nonexistent_id: PASS - returns 404 for valid-shape but nonexistent id
drops_feature.mongodb_indexes: PASS - expires_at TTL index + created_at -1 index exist

mocked_api_note: Spotify token exchange is MOCKED - cannot test full OAuth round-trip without browser.
